_publications._publicationTitle: Identification of Pathogenic Missense Mutations of NF1 Using Computational Approaches.

_contextSnippet: we utilized the advanced AlphaFold3 predictive tool to simulate the structures of the wild-type NF1 protein...as well as the C379R...R1000C...and C1016Y...mutant proteins
details: Successfully simulated structures of wild-type NF1 and three mutant proteins (C379R, R1000C, C1016Y) with RMSD values of 1.737, 3.626, and 1.832 respectively
